title: National Training Fund (Amendment) Act 2025 (Commencement) Order 2026.
text:
S.I. No. 6/2026 - National Training Fund (Amendment) Act 2025 (Commencement) Order 2026

1. This Order may be cited as the National Training Fund (Amendment) Act 2025 (Commencement) Order 2026.
2. The 19th day of January 2026 is appointed as the day on which the National Training Fund (Amendment) Act 2025 (No. 21 of 2025) shall come into operation.
GIVEN under my Official Seal,
13 January, 2026.
JAMES LAWLESS,
